explanation: This command uses the same structure as the true positive but replaces the hardcoded path with the %TEMP% environment variable, which is equivalent to AppData\Local\Temp. This is a safe mutation technique (recoding with environment variables) that still triggers the Sigma rule.

This command uses the %USERPROFILE% environment variable to dynamically resolve to the user's AppData\Local\Temp directory. This is a safe mutation technique (recoding with environment variables) that still triggers the Sigma rule.
This command is a direct copy of the original command with no changes. It is included to show that the Sigma rule will detect the exact command as written.
